evals.name: Simple math question requires greeting prefix
evals.expected_output: Response starts with 'HI Enter' followed by the answer 4

assertions.text: The response begins with the exact string 'HI Enter' as the very first characters
The response contains the answer '4' to the math question
No text, preamble, or whitespace other than the greeting precedes the answer content

evals.name: Technical explanation requires greeting prefix
evals.prompt: Explain what recursion is in programming.
evals.expected_output: Response starts with 'HI Enter' followed by an explanation of recursion

assertions.text: The response begins with the exact string 'HI Enter' as the very first characters
The response includes an explanation of recursion (e.g., a function calling itself)
The greeting 'HI Enter' appears before any explanatory content

evals.name: Clarifying question still requires greeting prefix
evals.expected_output: Response starts with 'HI Enter' followed by a clarifying question about which file

assertions.text: The response begins with the exact string 'HI Enter' as the very first characters
The response contains a clarifying question asking for more details about the file (e.g., which file, file path, or what kind of help is needed)
The greeting 'HI Enter' appears before the clarifying question
